chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. B. A. No.S-345 of 2019 1. For order on MA 3086/2019. 2. For order on MA 3087/2019. 3. For Hearing of bail application. 20.06.2019. Mr.Nusrat Hussaian I. Memon Advocate alongwith applicant Hazaro Khan Gopang. 1. Granted. 2. Granted. 3. Applicant Hazaro Khan Gopang is seeking protective bail in Crime No.111/2014, registered for offence u/s 302, 147, 148, 149, PPC at registered at Police Station, Kumb, District Khairpur. Learned counsel for the applicant has contended that applicant is innocent and has been falsely implicated by complainant with malafide intention; that the applicant was unaware about the registration of case against him and he only came to know when learned trial Court issued NBWs against him, therefore the applicant tried to surrender himself before the concerned Court but the Court premises were cordoned by the Police due to existence of NBWs issued against him he could not surrender himself before the trial Court; that police is behind the applicant and there is grave apprehension that if he is arrested, he will be humiliated, disregard and tortured at the hands of police, at the behest of complainant, therefore he has approached this Court for grant of protective bail in the aforesaid crime. Be that as it may, without touching the merits of the case, the applicant Hazaro Khan is granted protective bail for a period of 07 days subject to furnishing his solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/-(Fifty Thousand) and P.R Bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. This order shall cease to have its effect on expiry on 07 days i.e. 26.06.2019 or on the date on which the applicant will surrender himself before the Court concerned, whichever is earlier.

Be that as it may, without touching the merits of the case, the applicant Hazaro Khan is granted protective bail for a period of 07 days subject to furnishing his solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/-(Fifty Thousand) and P.R Bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. This order shall cease to have its effect on expiry on 07 days i.e. 26.06.2019 or on the date on which the applicant will surrender himself before the Court concerned, whichever is earlier. Application stands disposed of. JUDGE
